channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [HOT] Softube|Softube Weekly Deals – 73% off on Echoes delay plugin.!? ENDS SOON
[HOT] Sonnox|Sonnox Summer Sale has been extended – up to 87% off on plugins and bundles.! BIG DISCOUNT
[FREEBIE] NoizLabs|NoizLabs has released Beheader clipper and saturation plugin for Mac & Win. The plugin is available as a free download for a limited time.!
[HOT] UVI|UVI Bastille Day Sale – get a $/?30 off on purchases of $/?99 or more with the code: BASTILLE30; get a $/?50 off on purchases of $/?149 or more with the code: BASTILLE50.!? ENDS SOON
[HOT] Brainworx|Plugin Alliance|Get up to 84% off in the Plugin Alliance & Brainworx July Sale.! BIG DISCOUNT
item.description: Descuento: 84% - Desarrollador: Brainworx | Plugin Alliance - Finaliza: 2026-07-31

item.title: [FREEBIE] Friendgineer Labs Inc|Chance by Tokyo Speirs – a free MultiFX randomizer.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Friendgineer Labs Inc - Finaliza: None

item.title: [HOT] IK Multimedia|Get 80% off Total Studio 5 by IK Multimedia. The discounted price is $39.99.! BIG DISCOUNT
[HOT] IK Multimedia|Get 66% off Total Studio 5 MAX by IK Multimedia. The discounted price is $199.99.!
[FREEBIE] Friendgineer Labs Inc.|Friendgineer Labs Inc. has releaed Chance a free multi-fx randomizer.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Friendgineer Labs Inc. - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] Air-G|Air-G Audio has released a collection of 18 free (or PWYW) plugins for Win, Mac & Linux, built on the open-source DSP algorithms of Airwindows.!
[HOT] UJAM|UJAM Summer Sale – up to 92% off on plugins and bundles. Plus, Super VHS plugin by Baby Audio for free with any purchase.! BIG DISCOUNT
[HOT] UJAM|Get up to 92% off in the UJAM Legacy Sale.! BIG DISCOUNT
[HOT] IK Multimedia|Get 66% off AmpliTube 5 MAX v2 by IK Multimedia. The discounted price is $99.99.!
[FREEBIE] DSPTone|Get RESTRUKT by DSPTone for free.!
[FREEBIE] Boris FX|Boris FX has released two free plugins, Boris FX PopRemover and RustleRemover, from the Boris FX CrumplePop bundle.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Boris FX - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [FREEBIE] [HOT] UVI|All registered Focusrite or Novation customers can get UVI Tape Suite for free.!

[HOT] Softube|Get 65% off Weiss MM-1 by Softube. The discounted price is $69.!
[HOT] Softube|Get 78% off Spring Reverb by Softube. The discounted price is $19.!

[HOT] Softube|Get 50% off Widener by Softube. The discounted price is $39.!
[HOT] Softube|Get 60% off Vocoder by Softube. The discounted price is $39.!
[HOT] Tokyo Dawn Labs|Get 60% off Tokyo Dawn Labs TDR SimuLathe REF at Audio Deluxe. The discounted price is $59.!? ENDS SOON

item.title: [HOT] Tokyo Dawn Labs|Get 70% off Tokyo Dawn Labs TDR Molot GE at Audio Deluxe. The discounted price is $15.!? ENDS SOON
item.description: Descuento: 70% - Desarrollador: Tokyo Dawn Labs - Finaliza: 2026-07-15

item.title: [HOT] IK Multimedia|Get 80% off Total Studio 5 Pro by IK Multimedia for $69.99 (Normally $342).! BIG DISCOUNT
[FREEBIE] Canvas Audio|Canvas Audio has released Double Dare, a free vocal doubler plugin for Mac & Win.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Canvas Audio - Finaliza: None

item.title: [HOT] AIR Music Technology|AIR Music Technology Summer Sale – up to 81% off on synths, effects, multi-sampled virtual instruments and bundles. Plus, up to three plugins free with your purchase.! BIG DISCOUNT
item.description: Descuento: 81% - Desarrollador: AIR Music Technology - Finaliza: 2026-08-02

item.title: [FREEBIE] Plugin Boutique|Plugin Boutique has launched Send/Return. Every two weeks, a new curated plugin lands alongside a tutorial and ideas to help you get something out of it straight away.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Plugin Boutique - Finaliza: None

item.title: [HOT] UVI|Get up to 40% off in the UVI Synth Anthology 5 Intro Sale.!
[FREEBIE] Parish Audio|S1 De-Esser by Parish Audio is free for a limited time!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Parish Audio - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [HOT] Universal Audio|Get up to 87% off in the Universal Audio UAD Half Yearly Sale.! BIG DISCOUNT

[HOT] MeldaProduction|Get up to 82% off in the MeldaProduction Creative Effects Sale.! BIG DISCOUNT
[HOT] u-he|Get 30% off Uhbik 2 by u-he. The discounted price is $139.!
[HOT] Diginoiz|Get 50% off Drum One Ss Bundle by Diginoiz. The discounted price is $24.95
[HOT] Diginoiz|Get 50% off Hattricks + Drum One Ss Bundle by Diginoiz. The discounted price is $59.45
[FREEBIE] Fine Classics Plugins|Fine Classics Plugins is again offering Fine Classics Saturator plugin for Mac & Win as a free download.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Fine Classics Plugins - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [FREEBIE] DAWJunkie|DAWJunkie has released Drumbo Jr, a free drum machine plugin for Win & Mac.!
[FREEBIE] Sonic Zest|Sonic Zest has released Chord Sketchpad, a free browser application for building chord progressions.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Sonic Zest - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] Infected Sounds|Infected Sounds are back and all synths are available for free. Windows only.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Infected Sounds - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] DAWJunkie|DAWJunkie has released Peggio Jr Arpeggiator Synth, a free synth plugin for Mac & Win.!
[HOT] Acustica Audio|Acustica Audio Summer Sale – up to 80% off store wide.! BIG DISCOUNT
[FREEBIE] umu|Get Unshuffle by UMU, a free desktop sample library organizer.!
[FREEBIE] [HOT] W.A. Production|W.A. Production is offering Vocal Splitter plugin as a free download. Use the code: GETWAVS.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: W.A. Production - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [FREEBIE] KReative Studio|Get KReative Smoother ? a free VST3/AU instrument that fades any orchestra library down to true silence.!
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: KReative Studio - Finaliza: None
